reference_policy: official/primary sources first; stricter risk interpretation wins

references.title: GateZero Project Truth
references.why: Defines what the product is and is not; prevents bot/profit hype drift.

references.title: GateZero Product Wedge
references.why: Locks the product promise: no trade without evidence, no execution without risk approval.

references.title: GateZero Risk Rules
references.why: Hard safety constraints that outrank feature appetite.

references.title: Financial Risk Gates
references.why: Defines the allowed autonomy level and promotion/rollback path.

references.title: Alpaca Trading API Docs
references.why: Account, order, position, and trading API reference.

references.title: Alpaca Paper Trading Docs
references.why: Paper-only testing before live trading; supports safe execution rehearsal.

references.title: Interactive Brokers API Home
references.why: Professional broker API reference for order/account/market-data access.

references.title: IBKR API Order Types
references.why: Order behavior, limitations, and required fields for execution planning.

references.title: IBKR TWS Basic Orders
references.why: Concrete examples of market/limit/stop order behavior and risk tradeoffs.
